title: A heliostat
abstract: A heliostat (2) for a solar-thermal power plant (1), comprising a pliable reflective surface (6) for reflecting sunlight towards a receiver (3) and at least one connection element (13) connected to the reflective surface (6) and to a surface control device (16). The at least one connection element (13) extends across the reflective surface (6) and being connected to the surface control device (16) by a support element (17). The surface control device (16) extends upwards in a direction generally perpendicular to the reflective surface (6) and is configured for moving the support element (17) in a direction generally perpendicular to the reflective surface (6) such that curvature of the reflective surface (6) is decreased or increased and a focal point of the heliostat (2) is adjusted.
claims: Claims 1. A heliostat (2) for a solar-thermal power plant (1), comprising: a pliable reflective surface (6) for reflecting sunlight towards a receiver (3); at least one connection element (13) connected to the reflective surface (6) and to a surface control device (16); the at least one connection element (13) extends across the reflective surface (6) and being connected to the surface control device (16) by a support element (17); the surface control device (16) extends upwards in a direction generally perpendicular to the reflective surface (6) and is configured for moving the support element (17) in a direction generally perpendicular to the reflective surface (6) such that curvature of the reflective surface (6) is decreased or increased and a focal point of the heliostat (2) is adjusted. 2. The heliostat (2) according to claim 1 , where the support element (17) is rotatably arranged in the surface control device (16). 3. The heliostat (2) according to claim 1 or 2, where the at least one connection element (13) extends through the surface control device (16). 4. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the at least one connection element (13) is connected to the reflective surface (6) at two separate reflective surface connection points (14, 15). 5. The heliostat (2) according to claim 4, where the two reflective surface connection points (14, 15) are located at opposing sides of the reflective surface (6). 6. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the reflective surface (6) is provided on a frame (8). 7. The heliostat (2) according to claim 6, where the frame (8) is defining an outer edge of the reflective surface (6). 8. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the reflective surface (6) comprises a plurality of reflective plate elements (7). 9. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the support element (17) is a pulley and the at least one connection element (13) is a wire. 10. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the movement of the support element (17) is controlled by a motor (20). 11. The heliostat (2) according to claim 10, where an off-axis element (21) is provided between the support element (17) and the motor (20), causing vibration upon rotating. 12. The heliostat (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, where the surface control device (16) comprises a control unit (27) provided with a photovoltaic solar panel (28) for powering the surface control device (16).
